sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47010" key="h(meroskopi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡμεροσκοπ-ία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n47010.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">watching by day</tr_>, [Id.]<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0058.tlg001.perseus-grc1:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6</biblScope></bibl>.tit.</sense> </entryFree>
